seoTitle: Delete a Blank Page in Google Docs (Fix Extra Pages)
metaDescription: Fix stubborn blank pages in Google Docs by clearing trailing spaces, adjusting paragraph spacing, checking margins, and removing hidden page breaks.
intro: Blank pages at the end of a document are usually caused by hidden paragraph breaks, trailing spaces, or leftover page breaks rather than anything wrong with your content. This guide walks through the common causes and how to clear each one so your document flows cleanly.

steps.heading: Understand what's causing the blank page
steps.body: Hidden paragraph breaks and trailing spaces often accumulate and force an unwanted new page.

steps.heading: Delete trailing spaces and empty rows
steps.body: Place your cursor at the end of the content and use backspace or delete to remove empty rows.

steps.heading: Fix excessive paragraph spacing
steps.body: Check the paragraph formatting panel for extra spacing settings that might be pushing content downward.

steps.heading: Review your page margins
steps.body: Open Page Setup to check whether your margin configuration is causing structural overflow.

steps.heading: Remove hidden page or section breaks
steps.body: Locate and delete any unintended Page Breaks or Section Breaks that are isolating an empty page.

faq.question: Why does Google Docs keep adding a blank page at the end?
faq.answer: This is usually caused by hidden paragraph breaks, trailing spaces, or a leftover page break that got inserted accidentally.

faq.question: I deleted the text but the blank page is still there. Why?
faq.answer: There may be a hidden Page Break or Section Break isolating that space, which needs to be found and deleted separately.

faq.question: Can margin settings cause blank pages?
faq.answer: Yes, misconfigured margins in Page Setup can create structural overflow that pushes content onto an extra page.

faq.question: Does this happen after big data tables?
faq.answer: Yes, large tables can sometimes leave a blank page behind them, which is a common troubleshooting case covered in this process.
